The drone stays glued to the rear bumper, then slingshots to the inside apex, skimming the guardrail by centimeters, sparks from tiny gravel hits, road reflectors (cats-eyes) strobing past like bullets. Rapid micro elevation changes, compression and rebound over bumps, audible turbo spool + wastegate, engine screaming.」が中心だから。
